title: 3 Piece Wallpaper & Paint Scraper Tool Set, Wooden Handle and Metal Blade, Perfect DIY Decorating Paint Removal Scraper Tool Set, Great for Filling, Drywall, Putty, Joints 1” 2” 3” 76mm 50mm 25mm
features: 🏠🚪🌓✨ PAINT SCRAPER TOOLS - This pack of Paint Scrapers contains three individual scrapers that are tough and durable, and suitable for a wide variety of DIY requirements. Scraper set includes Chisel Knife Scraper (1 x 3cm/1”), Small Stripping Scraper (5 x 5.5cm/1.8”), Large Stripping Scraper (1 x 7.11cm/2.8””)

🏠🚪🌓✨ PACK OF 3 SCRAPERS - The perfect painters tool set for filling holes, stripping paint and wallpaper scrapers to create that smooth finish. Each scraper features a metal blade with a large scraping face and is complete with an easy grip handle

🏠🚪🌓✨ METAL BLADE SCRAPER - Quality grade steel blades are durable and hard wearing. Essential Tool for Paint Removal from Metal, Brick, Wood, Stone, Internal Walls etc. Perfect removing accidentally painted windows, tiles, plastic switch covers etc

🏠🚪🌓✨ EASY GRIP WOODEN HANDLE - Wallpaper and paint scraper set. Can also be used as a putty knife or for filling holes & cracks on surfaces in preparation for painting. Each scraper has a generous flex to it allowing for a great user experience
description: Product Description 3 Piece Wallpaper & Paint Scraper Tool Set Pack of 3 Includes Small Stripping Scraper (5 x 5.5cm/1.8”) Meet our Small Stripping Scraper a miniature marvel that works wonders on imperfections, ensuring a flawless finish. Don't let its size fool you; this little dynamo is your trusted sidekick for smoothing over holes with finesse, making rough edges a thing of the past. Large Stripping Scraper (1 x 7.11cm/2.8””) Our Large Scraper is a versatile tool designed for efficiently removing paint, wallpaper, and other materials from larger surfaces. Its substantial size and sturdy construction make it an ideal choice for tackling extensive stripping tasks with ease. Chisel Knife Scraper (1 x 3cm/1”) The Chisel Knife Scraper is the perfect tool for precision work, excelling at scraping paint from tight corners and window seals with ease. Its compact size makes it an ideal companion for detailed tasks, ensuring accuracy and efficiency in your scraping endeavors. The Design and Features User Friendly Achieve a flawless finish with our premium painter's toolkit, designed for tasks like hole filling, paint stripping, and wallpaper scraping. Each scraper boasts a robust metal blade with an expansive scraping surface, complemented by an easy-grip handle. Crafted from high-quality steel, the durable blades ensure long-lasting performance. This tool is indispensable for removing paint from various surfaces such as metal, brick, wood, stone, and internal walls. It's great for precision work, like restoring accidentally painted windows, tiles, and plastic switch covers. This versatile wallpaper and paint scraper set can double as a putty knife and is ideal for filling holes and cracks in preparation for painting. With each scraper offering a generous flexibility, users can enjoy a seamless and user-friendly experience. Elevate your painting projects with this comprehensive and reliable toolkit. The Blade The high-quality stainless steel blades are not just strong and flexible, they're also rust-resistant, wear-resistant, and built to endure the test of time. Elevate your DIY game with a scraper that combines functionality, style, and the resilience to tackle any project with finesse. Great for exterior and interior projects. The Design with Hanging Hole Crafted for comfort and durability, our scrapers are a game-changer in the world of DIY projects. The wooden handle not only adds a touch of elegance but also ensures a non-slip grip that defies breakage, making your projects a walk in the park. We've added hanging holes to the handle for easy storage, ensuring that your scraper is always within arm's reach when inspiration strikes. Useful For: Paint Stripping Hole Filling Wallpaper Scraping Metal Blade Easy Grip Handle Hanging Hole
